jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Marketplace Order Fulfillment
jobs.content:
About the role

Own the Instacart Marketplace order-fulfillment pipeline that routes tens of millions of grocery orders per week across the global retailer-network distributed analysis layer.

  • Go, distributed-systems, and high-throughput streaming experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Ad Sales — Connected Stores
jobs.content: Own Instacart's ad-sales motion roadmap across enterprise-account adoption of the Connected Stores commerce-media platform, the Caper AI smart-cart in-aisle inventory, and the Eversight pricing-optimisation surface.
